title: Custom Serialization Methods Should Have Required Signatures
description: Ensures that custom serialization methods in Java classes have the required signatures to function correctly.
recommendation: Ensure custom serialization methods have the correct access modifier, return type, and are static when necessary.
impact: Improves maintainability and reduces unexpected behavior at runtime.

checks.message: Custom serialization methods must have correct signatures: writeObject(ObjectOutputStream) and readObject(ObjectInputStream)
